L1.description: A sandbox bypass vulnerability exists in the Groovy script execution pipeline. Scripts are parsed and compiled into executable objects before being passed to the sandbox for protected execution. Because the compilation occurs outside the sandbox boundary, an attacker who can supply custom Groovy scripts can craft code that escapes the sandbox's security restrictions, enabling arbitrary code execution on the Jenkins controller JVM.

ground_truth.reason: The plugin parses Groovy DSL scripts into compiled Script objects before passing them to the sandbox, allowing attackers with control over DSL definitions to bypass sandbox restrictions and execute arbitrary code on the Jenkins master JVM.
